commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove unused network API dependencies

- Remove -lbnetapi from Makefile
- Update README.md links
- Remove net API docs from memory
- The program doesn't use any network functionality
- Keep -ltracker for BFilePanel

commit.message:
Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add chore edit modal and overdue sort

- Click any chore card to open pre-populated edit modal (name, frequency, room)
- Complete/Delete buttons stop propagation so they don't trigger edit
- Optimistic update with rollback on edit, same as complete/delete
- Overdue chores sort to top within each filter tab; within same status, sorted by days until due
- cursor: pointer on chore cards

commit.message:
FASE 4 Part A & B: Add professor grading components and pages

## New Reusable Components (Grading folder)
- GradeMatrixInline.razor: Inline grade editing matrix without modals
- GradeStatisticsPanel.razor: Statistics display with distribution chart
- FeedbackTemplateSelector.razor: Reusable template selector component

## New Professor Pages
- CalificacionUnificada.razor: Unified grading dashboard (Tareas + Evaluaciones)
  - Course selector with tab navigation
  - Integrated grade matrix and statistics panels
  - Real-time average calculation

- BulkGrading.razor: Bulk grading interface
  - Multi-select submission grading
  - Bulk feedback entry with pending changes summary
  - Grade-based submission filtering

- GradeStatistics.razor: Class-level statistics dashboard
  - Course-wise statistics aggregation
  - Task-wise performance distribution
  - Student performance ranking (Top 20)
  - PDF and Excel export placeholders

- FeedbackTemplates.razor: Feedback template management
  - Template CRUD operations with modal form
  - Search and subject-based filtering
  - Template preview and copy-to-clipboard functionality

All components include proper state management, error handling, and styling integration with workspace CSS variables.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Doctor page MongoDB fetch — refetch on every page visit

- Fix fetchInc: was reverted to hardcoded string "http://localhost:3001/api/incidents"
  instead of template literal using API_BASE — now uses ${API_BASE}/api/incidents
- Fix handleDeleteFeedback: was still using hardcoded localhost:3001, now uses API_BASE
- Add useLocation import and make useEffect depend on location.pathname so data
  refetches every time the user navigates to /doctor (not just on first mount)
- Move fetchFeedback into the same effect so both reload together on page visit
- Reset loadingInc=true at start of each fetchInc call for correct spinner state
- Fix backend CORS: was limited to ports 5173/5176/3000; now allows any
  localhost/127.0.0.1 origin so Vite port changes never silently block requests

commit.message:
Full re-render on orientation change instead of just chart.resize()

When width changes by >50px (orientation flip), do a full render()
after 400ms delay — disposes and recreates all charts at the correct
new dimensions. Small resizes still use the lightweight .resize().
Fixes charts stuck at landscape width on portrait return.

add honest assessment and critical thinking to agent interactions

- Add "CHALLENGE, THEN COMMIT" principle to orchestrator: surface concerns
  before decisions are locked in, then execute without hesitation
- Add "CHALLENGE THE PREMISE" principle to clarifier: question whether the
  request is the right thing to build before gathering detailed requirements
- Add pushback protocol to designer: push back once with specific concerns
  if user picks against recommendation, then commit to their choice
- Add "SIMPLEST PLAN" principle to planner: complexity must be justified by
  requirements, not habit or future-proofing
- Update all checkpoints to require honest "My assessment" section instead
  of rubber-stamp approval requests
- Add scope sanity check to REQUIREMENTS_REVIEW checkpoint

commit.message:
Use go2rtc native streaming instead of ffmpeg (#541)

* Add brand assets for HACS validation

Copy Dahua brand icons and logos from the home-assistant/brands
repository into custom_components/dahua/brand/ so HACS validation
no longer needs to fall back to the brands repository.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Use go2rtc native streaming instead of ffmpeg

Set frontend_stream_type to WEB_RTC so Home Assistant uses go2rtc
for camera streams instead of transcoding via ffmpeg. This reduces
CPU usage and latency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix session leaks, replace blocking threads with async tasks, and add reauth

- Fix session leak in config_flow._test_credentials() by adding finally clause
- Fix session leak on unload by calling coordinator.async_stop() which closes session
- Fix != None to is not None in _close_session()
- Replace DahuaEventThread/DahuaVtoEventThread with native async tasks
- Replace threading.Timer in VTO client with loop.call_later()
- Replace loop.stop() in VTO with disconnected future for clean reconnect
- Fix swallowed exceptions in client.stream_events() (re-raise CancelledError)
- Add reauthentication flow triggered on HTTP 401 during initialization
- Delete thread.py (no longer needed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Improve Learning Paths: 12 P0-P2 fixes for bugs, UX, and accessibility

P0 - Bug fixes:
- Fix lesson marked viewed before content loads (moved after success)
- Escape all GPT output before innerHTML to prevent XSS

P1 - UX improvements:
- Add Previous button in lesson footer for navigation back
- Remove hardcoded '5 lessons' — derive count dynamically from API
- Add retry buttons to all error states + parse 429 rate limit
- Make viewed lesson items clickable in path preview for direct jump
- Add Cache-Control headers (1hr CDN) to list and detail API endpoints

P2 - Accessibility & polish:
- Add role=button, tabindex, keyboard handler to path cards
- Add focus-visible outline for keyboard navigation
- Add iOS safe-area padding to fixed lesson footer
- Fix swipe gesture conflict with iOS Safari edge swipe (30px dead zone)
- Add aria-label state changes to audio button (play/pause)
- Filter completed paths from completion screen suggestions

commit.message:
Add Impossible difficulty (5x multiplier) across all 14 challenges

Nearly impossible settings for every challenge:
- Logic Blocks: all 8 steps + 2 distractors, technical puzzles
- Tiny Economy: 99% optimal threshold required
- Mini Paradox: level 3 + distractor options
- Escape Puzzle: 5 choices per step
- Word Search: 16x16 grid, 14 words, all directions
- Decipher: only 3 guesses, hard mode
- Number Grid: 9x9 with only 17 revealed cells
- Word Bloom: find 45 words
- Perfect Pulse: tiny zone (10), fast speed (140), 20 hits
- Deduction: lies about everything, minimal clues
- Memory Flip: 18 pairs in 45 seconds
- Maze Runner: 25x25 with deceptive corridors
- Mosaic: 5x6 grid, 7 values, 5 linked pairs
- Number Crunch: only 3 guesses, all operators, hard mode

commit.message:
Add string.lines and list.get_or to stdlib

string.lines(s) splits text by newline and filters empty lines.
list.get_or(xs, i, default) returns element or default value.
Both eliminate the most common verbose patterns in generated code.

Fix CI deploy: remove flake update, reset stale systemd units

- Remove nix flake update --commit-lock-file (dirtied git tree on server)
- Add systemctl reset-failed before nixos-rebuild (prevents conflict
  with lingering transient units from previous runs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(hdr-editor): add .pic support, robust multi-monitor restore, and PDF path fix

- Extend _scan_hdr_files() glob to include *.pic (Radiance RGBE from IESVE)
- Treat .pic extension as RGBE in _load_image() alongside .hdr
- Replace winfo_vrootwidth safety check with EnumDisplayMonitors (ctypes) for
  accurate off-screen detection when monitors are disconnected; clamps w/h to
  primary screen dimensions; falls back to winfo_screenwidth on non-Windows
- Fix window layout on launch: call set_size_inches before canvas.resize in
  _force_resize_update so matplotlib axes recalculate to actual maximised size
- Add second deferred _force_resize_update at 400ms to handle async Windows zoom
- Reduce initial figsize to (8, 5) to avoid off-screen pre-render before maximise
- Fix pdf_path being silently overwritten by session restore: capture constructor
  value before _load_session() and reinstate it if explicitly provided

Add standalone OpenAI Realtime voice agent widget

Extracted from BharatVoice AI — a self-contained floating voice widget
that connects to OpenAI's Realtime API via a server-side WebSocket proxy.

Includes: Express proxy server, React FAB component with call UI,
AudioService (24kHz PCM16), latency tracker, course link detection,
email draft detection, and self-contained CSS.

commit.message:
[Design] Comprehensive LV luxury overhaul — tokens, typography, spacing, reveals

Tokens: add missing rose-gold, font-mono, easing, shadows, spacing, GLOW
tier colors, violet to custom.css :root. Sync shadow-glow across all files.

Typography: headings Outfit 700/-0.01em, h1 800/-0.02em clamp(2.5rem,6vw,4.5rem),
buttons Outfit 600/13px/0.01em, labels Outfit 500/12px/0.08em, body 0.01em tracking.

Layout: header 56px height, cream bg with glassmorphism, desktop nav hidden
(all navigation in drawer overlay). Container 1440px max-width with fluid padding.
Product grid 32px gap. Hero-to-content 120px gap. Section headings 40px mb.

Cards: hair type pills warm gray border + 4px radius, Add to Bag Outfit 600.
Footer: 80px padding, copyright Cormorant Garamond italic.
Collection: title 800 weight, sidebar labels 14px, filter pills DM Sans 12px.
Cart: thumbnail warm bg, GLOW Bucks violet, checkout black.
Search: DM Sans input, JetBrains Mono prices. Account: points JetBrains Mono.

Scroll reveals: auto-applied to homepage sections via CSS + IntersectionObserver.
Rose-gold hover scoped to content links only (not buttons/CTAs).

embeds with Cast to TV button. Added 'image' and 'video' to MessageType.
